name: PipelinePolicyAgentInstaller
description: Find in cache or download a specific version of a policy engine (Sentinel or OPA) and prepend it to the PATH
author: sethbacon

inputs.name: version
inputs.label: Version
inputs.helpMarkDown: The version to install. Use 'latest' to install the current latest release.

inputs.name: downloadSource
inputs.label: Download source
inputs.helpMarkDown: Where to download the policy agent from. Sentinel installs from releases.hashicorp.com; OPA from GitHub releases.

inputs.name: registryUrl
inputs.label: Registry base URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: Base URL of your terraform-registry-backend instance. Must use HTTPS. Example: https://registry.example.com

inputs.name: registryMirrorName
inputs.label: Mirror configuration name
inputs.helpMarkDown: The mirror configuration name in your registry backend. This is the {name} path segment in /terraform/binaries/{name}/... (e.g. 'opa' or 'sentinel').

inputs.name: registryAllowedHosts
inputs.label: Allowed download_url hosts
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional comma- or newline-separated allowlist of hostnames the registry's download_url is permitted to use (e.g. storage.example.com, or *.s3.amazonaws.com to allow any subdomain). When empty (default), the download_url host is trusted as returned by the registry. Set this to pin a compromised or misbehaving registry from redirecting downloads to an arbitrary HTTPS host.

inputs.name: mirrorBaseUrl
inputs.label: Mirror base URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: Base URL of your binary mirror. Must use HTTPS. Must serve files at the same path structure as the official releases for the selected agent.

inputs.name: requireGpgSignature
inputs.label: Require GPG signature verification
inputs.helpMarkDown: Sentinel only. When enabled, fail if the GPG signature of SHA256SUMS is unavailable. Disable for mirrors that do not serve .sig files.

inputs.name: requireChecksum
inputs.label: Require checksum verification
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled (default), fail if a SHA256 checksum is not available for the requested version/platform. Note: OPA (and any mirror source) publishes no GPG/cosign signature here, so this checksum is a same-origin transport-integrity check, not independent-authenticity verification (see SECURITY.md). Also controls tool-cache re-verification on persistent/self-hosted agents: when enabled, a cached tool that carries no local integrity marker (cached by an older installer version, or by a job that ran with verification disabled) is re-downloaded and re-verified before use, degrading to a warning only when the source is unreachable (offline/air-gapped agents keep working). Avoid mixing requireChecksum values across jobs that share an agent's tool cache.

outputVariables.name: policyAgentLocation
outputVariables.description: The location of the policy agent binary that was installed on the agent.

outputVariables.name: policyAgentDownloadedFrom
outputVariables.description: The source from which the agent was downloaded: 'official', 'registry:<url>', 'mirror:<url>', or 'cache'.

messages.InputVersionNotValidSemanticVersion: Input version %s is not a valid semantic version
messages.PolicyAgentNotFoundInFolder: Policy agent executable not found in path %s
messages.PolicyAgentDownloadFailed: Failed to download policy agent from url %s. Error: %s
messages.VersionNotFound: Unable to get latest version from source, using fallback version
messages.InsecureUrlRejected: Insecure URL rejected: %s. Only HTTPS URLs are allowed.
messages.RegistryRequestFailed: Registry request failed for %s. HTTP status: %s
messages.RegistryDownloadHostNotAllowed: Registry download_url host '%s' is not in registryAllowedHosts: %s
messages.CachedToolVerificationFailed: Cached %s failed integrity re-verification (stored: %s, actual: %s). The cached copy may have been tampered with or corrupted since it was last verified; clear the tool cache for this version and re-run to force a fresh, verified download.
messages.ReverifyingCachedTool: Cache hit for %s has no stored integrity marker (cached before re-verification existed, or with checksum verification disabled). Re-downloading the release to re-verify the cached executable; set requireChecksum to false to skip this.
messages.CachedToolReverificationUnavailable: Could not re-verify cached %s: %s. Proceeding with the cached executable — expected for offline/air-gapped agents; set requireChecksum to false to skip the attempt and silence this warning.
messages.CachedToolReverificationMismatch: Cached %s does not match the freshly downloaded, verified release (verified: %s, cached: %s). The cached copy was either never verified or has been altered since caching; clear the agent's tool cache for this version and re-run.
messages.CachedToolReverified: Cached %s re-verified against the freshly downloaded, verified release; integrity marker written for future cache hits.
